form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to his best. Last start 5th (Fr3) over 1635m after showing early speed at Temora, at the bell was 3rd-3.8 beaten 4 m by Ideal Andy (2:00.70) in 2 WINs on April 6 at $2.80. The run before 9th (Fr3) over 1740m after showing early speed at Riverina Paceway beaten 20 m by Franco Nickelback (2:02.70) in NR up to 53 on March 20 at $10. Draws the inside so worth another chance.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear racing room in the run to finish and not fully tested.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Fr3) over 1790m at Mildura, at the bell was 6th-8.8 beaten 18 m by Ronzel Micky (2:13.50) in NR 49 to 53 on April 7 at $21. Two runs back was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr2) over 1800m after showing early pace at Globe Derby Park, at the bell was 4th-4.5m on the pegs beaten 11 m by Torque Intheusa (2:13.10) in Max - 1 win of $5001 or more on January 10 at $15. Will take a lot from that run and draws well so can improve.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Held up for clear running on the final turn.

form.formComment: Last start 8th (Fr4) over 1635m after showing early speed and racing wide at Temora was 5th-8 at the bell, beaten 16 m by Ideal Andy (2:00.70) in 2 WINs on April 6 at $13. At the start before good run when 3rd (Sr1) over 2170m at Junee was 6th-9.2 at the bell, beaten 14 m by My Latin Lady (2:48.00) in NR up to 50 M on March 31 at $15. Draws well so is among the exotic chances.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced behind the tiring Cullect A Starr near the 600m.

form.formComment: Meets Harjaybro again; when 115 metres tenth at Temora over 1635m in a 0-1 WIN race on April 6. Must do a lot more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Meets Harjaybro again; when 115 metres tenth at Temora over 1635m in a 0-1 WIN race on April 6. Must do a lot more.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Leaving the 300m became unbalanced and broke stride.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into fifth after being driven well back, behind Hezaflashone at Riverina Paceway over 1740m in a NR up to 47 on March 27 at $11. Then a handy effort when well beaten into second behind Gem N Em at Riverina Paceway over 1740m in a NR up to 58 M on April 4 at $31. Contender.

form.formComment: Didn't do much at the last run, 10th (Fr1) over 1730m at Bathurst beaten 21 m by Beyond Doubt (2:06.10) in NR up to 60 on March 18 at $101. Before that 6th (Fr4) over 2260m at Bathurst beaten 20 m by Johnnys Blue (2:47.10) in NR up to 45 on March 11 at $17. Prefer others.

form.formComment: Last start by 1.0 m as favourite (Sr3) at Temora (2:00.80) beating The Heats On Lexy in 0-1 WIN on April 6 at $1.75 at the bell was leading 2.3. Racing well and can make an impact again.
